query:
-- TIAB SIM services - unlinked to customers
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.supplierName,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.monthlyCost
FROM services s
WHERE (s.supplierName = 'TIAB' OR s.planName LIKE '%4G%' OR s.planName LIKE '%SIM%')
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '')
ORDER BY s.customerName
LIMIT 60;

  s.planName,

  s.customerExternalId,
  s.supplierName,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.monthlyCost
FROM services s
WHERE (s.supplierName = 'TIAB' OR s.planName LIKE '%4G%' OR s.planName LIKE '%SIM%')
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '')
ORDER BY s.customerName
LIMIT 60;
